---
title: "DESeq2_Clemson_output"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "2025-06-30"
output: html_document
---


```{r}

# --- libraries
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(DESeq2)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)   # for non-overlapping labels (optional)
})

# --- read
expr <- read.delim("redo.ensembl.stranded.counts.renamed.subset.txt", check.names = FALSE)
stopifnot("Geneid" %in% colnames(expr))
rownames(expr) <- make.unique(expr$Geneid)

# If from featureCounts, drop annotation columns:
ann_cols <- intersect(colnames(expr), c("Geneid","Chr","Start","End","Strand","Length"))
cts <- expr[ , setdiff(colnames(expr), ann_cols), drop = FALSE]

# Coerce ALL counts to integer (fail if not near-integers)
stopifnot(all(sapply(cts, is.numeric)))
if (!all(as.matrix(cts) == round(as.matrix(cts)))) {
  stop("Count matrix contains non-integer values. Provide raw integer counts.")
}
storage.mode(cts) <- "integer"

# --- metadata (keep your vectors but be explicit)
condition <- c("controlF","controlF","experimental","controlP","experimental",
               "experimental","controlP","controlF","controlP","controlP")
coldata <- data.frame(condition = factor(condition, levels = c("controlF","controlP","experimental")),
                      row.names = colnames(cts))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(coldata), colnames(cts)))

# --- DESeq2
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = cts, colData = coldata, design = ~ condition)

# Prefilter: keep genes with 10+ counts in at least 2 samples
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) >= 2
dds <- dds[keep, ]

dds <- DESeq(dds)

# Explicit contrasts
res_exp_vs_controlF <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition","experimental","controlF"), alpha = 0.05)
res_ctrlP_vs_ctrlF  <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition","controlP","controlF"), alpha = 0.05)
res_exp_vs_ctrlP    <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition","experimental","controlP"), alpha = 0.05)

# Shrink LFCs (apeglm)
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(apeglm))
res_exp_vs_controlF_shr <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast = c("condition","experimental","controlF"), type = "apeglm")
res_ctrlP_vs_ctrlF_shr  <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast = c("condition","controlP","controlF"), type = "apeglm")
res_exp_vs_ctrlP_shr    <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast = c("condition","experimental","controlP"), type = "apeglm")

# Write results
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_exp_vs_controlF_shr), "DESeq2_experimental_vs_controlF.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_ctrlP_vs_ctrlF_shr),  "DESeq2_controlP_vs_controlF.csv",     row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_exp_vs_ctrlP_shr),    "DESeq2_experimental_vs_controlP.csv", row.names = TRUE)

# QC transform + PCA
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)
p <- DESeq2::plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition", returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(p, "percentVar"))
gp <- ggplot(p, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition, label = name)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", percentVar[1], "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", percentVar[2], "%)")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
ggsave("DESeq2_PCA.pdf", gp, width = 6, height = 5)




```
